title: Water Crews Working to Repair Water Main Break on E Washington St
summary: The City of Syracuse Department of Water is repairing a water main break on the 100 block of East Washington Street, with service disruptions expected until late morning on December 29, 2024. Two street segments will be closed to vehicle traffic during repairs, though sidewalks remain accessible with detours in place.

entity_refs.name: City of Syracuse Department of Water
